name: Blue Starshard
descs:
Enemies in Low Morale or Panic states lose 1 Final Power (against targets without SP, when they have 25+ [Sinking])
- When dealing damage against the affected enemies with Skills that apply [Sinking], [Sinking] Count, or Unique Sinking, inflict 2 [DefenseDown] (2 times per turn)

Enemies in Low Morale or Panic states lose 2 Final Power (against targets without SP, when they have 15+ [Sinking])
- When dealing damage against the affected enemies with Skills that apply [Sinking], [Sinking] Count, or Unique Sinking, inflict 3 [DefenseDown] (2 times per turn)

Enemies in Low Morale or Panic states lose 3 Final Power (against targets without SP, when they have 10+ [Sinking])
- When dealing damage against the affected enemies with Skills that apply [Sinking], [Sinking] Count, or Unique Sinking, inflict 3 [DefenseDown] (3 times per turn)
